hero.headline: Automate manual work. Focus on what matters.
hero.subheadline: JK Consulting implements AI and automation for small businesses that can't afford to waste time on repetitive processes.

problem.title: Are you losing time on tasks that could be automated?
problem.text: Small businesses spend hours on repetitive, low-value manual work. Spreadsheets that don't talk to each other. Emails that go unanswered. Data scattered everywhere. You know there's a solution — but don't know where to start.

items.title: Done-for-you implementation
items.desc: We don't deliver slide decks. We go live and make sure it works.

items.title: Zero technical jargon
items.desc: We speak business language, not IT. You understand every step.

items.title: Small business focus
items.desc: We're not a large consultancy. We're the right partner for growing businesses.

items.title: Measurable results
items.desc: We set clear goals upfront. You measure the impact on your bottom line.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Practical AI and automation solutions for small businesses

automacao-ia.name: AI Process Automation
automacao-ia.short: Identify and eliminate manual tasks with AI-powered automated workflows.
automacao-ia.hero: Stop doing manually what AI can do for you
automacao-ia.problem: Your team spends hours on repetitive tasks: answering emails, entering data, copying information between systems. This costs money and energy that should go toward growth.
delivers: AI-powered data entry and document processing
Workflow triggers between tools (CRM → invoice → notification)
AI chatbots for client triage or FAQ handling
automacao-ia.for_whom: For small businesses with repetitive processes consuming team time.
automacao-ia.result: Fewer manual hours per week. Fewer errors. Team focused on strategic work.

consultoria-crm.name: CRM Consulting & Implementation
consultoria-crm.short: The right CRM, configured and running — with your team actually using it.
consultoria-crm.hero: A CRM your team actually uses
consultoria-crm.problem: Many companies have a CRM, but it became a data graveyard. Nobody uses it. Nothing gets updated. The sales funnel visibility is zero.
delivers: CRM platform selection (HubSpot, Zoho, Pipedrive and others)
Full CRM setup and data migration
Custom pipelines for sales, customer service or operations
consultoria-crm.for_whom: For companies that have lost leads due to lack of follow-up or never had a structured sales process.
consultoria-crm.result: Organized sales team, automatic follow-ups and full funnel visibility.

otimizacao-processos.name: Process Optimization & Efficiency
otimizacao-processos.short: We map your bottlenecks and redesign workflows to free up your team.
otimizacao-processos.problem: Every business has bottlenecks. Slow steps, approvals that get stuck, information that gets lost. The problem is that when you're inside it, it's hard to see.
otimizacao-processos.for_whom: For businesses that feel they work a lot but results don't match the effort.
otimizacao-processos.result: Documented processes, eliminated bottlenecks and team investing time in high-value activities.

analytics-dados.name: Analytics & Data Reporting
analytics-dados.short: Dashboards your team actually uses — without a data team.
analytics-dados.hero: Make decisions with data, not guesswork
analytics-dados.problem: You have data scattered in spreadsheets, CRMs and systems. But when making a decision, everything becomes intuition because nobody has time to consolidate anything.
delivers: Google Sheets / Looker Studio / Power BI setup
analytics-dados.for_whom: For managers who need business visibility without depending on a data analyst.
analytics-dados.result: Automatically updated dashboard, meetings with data on hand and faster decisions.

transformacao-digital.name: Digital Transformation Strategy
transformacao-digital.short: From diagnosis to roadmap — we guide your modernization from start to finish.
transformacao-digital.hero: Modernize your business without turning it upside down
transformacao-digital.problem: Digital transformation seems scary. Too many tools, too many options, high cost and risk of failure. Without a guide, it's easy to make expensive mistakes.
transformacao-digital.for_whom: For business owners who know they need to modernize, but don't know where to start.
transformacao-digital.result: Clear roadmap, right tools selected and implementation that doesn't paralyze operations.

treinamento-ia.name: AI Tools Training & Adoption
treinamento-ia.short: Your team using AI confidently in daily work — workshops tailored to your business.
treinamento-ia.hero: AI in practice, not in theory
treinamento-ia.problem: Everyone talks about AI, but your team still doesn't know how to use it in real work. There's no shortage of tools — there's a shortage of context and proper training.
delivers: Tool-specific workshops (ChatGPT, Copilot, Notion AI and others)
Custom prompt libraries for your sector
treinamento-ia.for_whom: For teams that hear about AI every day but still don't know how to apply it at work.
treinamento-ia.result: Productive team with AI, fewer hours spent on manual tasks and real tool adoption.

about.title: About JK Consulting
about.mission: Help small businesses work less and grow more, with AI and automation implemented in a practical and accessible way.
about.founder_bio: Specialist in applied AI and digital transformation for small businesses. I believe technology only has value when it's used. That's why I don't leave projects on paper — I implement, train and follow through until the solution is actually working.
values: Clarity before complexity — we explain every step in plain language
Results first — we only propose what generates measurable impact
Long-term partnership — we don't disappear after delivery
Business focus, not technology — the tool is a means, not an end
